title: Interfaces, Dynamic Types, Errors, and API Boundaries · Runtime Contract: Api Capability Boundaries
summary: A notification service must accept narrow capabilities, preserve error causes, and distinguish nil interfaces from typed nil values. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go api capability boundaries increment in a capability-oriented notification boundary. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Place interfaces at consumer boundaries, return concrete useful types, and evaluate mocks, adapters, and evolution cost.
Create, return, wrap, join, inspect, and classify error values with errors.Is and errors.As while preserving causes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
